digest.verified_digest:
Here's a summary of the articles in 3-4 factual sentences:

The current generation of computers is advancing rapidly with the development of quantum computers, as seen in the UK's rollout of quantum computers at scale to aid in disease research, job creation, and national security. Meanwhile, companies like Kodiak AI are utilizing NVIDIA's technology, such as the NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion, to scale autonomous driving capabilities. Additionally, NVIDIA is set to release its DLSS 5 update, which will enhance visual effects in games, and is also working on new GPU and CPU architectures, including the Rubin GPU and Vera CPU. Furthermore, companies are integrating post-quantum cryptography into their products, such as SEALSQ and Parrot's secure drones.

Sources:
- [www.gov.uk] UK’s "Quantum leap"  to help beat disease, deliver high-paid jobs, and strengthen national security, as first country in the world to roll out Quantum computers at scale
- [GlobeNewswire] Kodiak AI Scales Autonomous Driving with NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion
- [The Times of India] NVIDIA DLSS 5 arrives this fall: Which games and gaming studios will receive this 'Hollywood' level VFX update?
- [Storagereview.com] NVIDIA GTC 2026: Rubin GPUs, Groq LPUs, Vera CPUs, and What NVIDIA Is Building for Trillion-Parameter Inference
- [GlobeNewswire] SEALSQ and Parrot Expand Their Strategic Partnership: Parrot to Integrate SEALSQ Post-Quantum Cryptography into Its Next Generation of Secure Drones

Sources verified on-chain.
digest.unverified_digest: Trump compares Iran strikes to Pearl Harbor as he meets Japan’s PM • AFCON 2025 title "cannot be taken away" from Senegal, says FSF • Congolese citizens welcome Belgian court trial in Lumumba case

temporal_graph.story_duration: Story has been developing for 7 day(s).
temporal_graph.note: How this story evolved hour by hour. Nodes with blockchain_proof=true have cryptographic timestamps — immutable proof of when information first appeared.

hyper_local_coverage.coverage_advantage: All results are from mainstream sources. For this topic, major outlets provided full coverage.
hyper_local_coverage.note: Sources like GDELT (65,000 global outlets), Feedly-discovered feeds, and RSS Bridge surface news that Google deprioritises and ChatGPT never trained on.

ranking_transparency.method: Reinforcement Learning (RL) — general ranking, no personal data

factors.description: TF-IDF and semantic similarity between article and search query.
Articles registered and verified on-chain receive a higher trust boost.
Articles specifically about the searched topic rank above general news.
Established outlets with strong editorial standards rank higher.
Aggregate engagement signals from all readers (no personal data used).
More recent articles ranked slightly higher within the same relevance band.

ranking_transparency.statement: Results are ranked by relevance, source reliability, and blockchain trust signals. No advertising influences ranking. No personal data is used for anonymous sessions.
ranking_transparency.note: We show you exactly why results are ranked as they are. No advertising influences our ranking — ever.
